Tottenham will be in the away dressing room for the Champions League final against Liverpool, despite being nominated as the home team.

Due to security reasons, the Tottenham squad have now been allocated the away dressing room with Liverpool given the home dressing room.

Tottenham supporters will be based in the north side of the Wanda Metropolitano Stadium, which has resulted in the decision to switch dressing rooms.

Tickets for the Champions League final between Liverpool and Tottenham are being touted online for up to more than £40,000.

Liverpool and Tottenham fans will share 33,226 tickets for the final at a stadium with a capacity of 68,000.

Liverpool and Tottenham fans said face-value tickets at more than £500 were "exorbitant" in a joint statement last week, and some tickets for the final have appeared for resale on StubHub for more than £40,000.

歐洲足協公佈，在4強絕地反擊擊敗阿積士晉級的熱刺，是本屆歐聯決賽的「主隊」，利物浦則為「客隊」，但基於保安理由，主隊熱刺卻需要使用「客隊」更衣室。 就是由於熱刺球迷使用球場的北看台作為打氣專區，令到球隊也要「換更衣室」。萬達大都會球場經理表示已為多個單位作好溝通，「球場已經與熱刺球迷，馬德里與西班牙警方作好溝通，點算好球迷數量，出發路線與球迷會面點。」 「因此，經過雙方同意下，利物浦球迷將會使用南看台，而熱刺球迷則使用北看台，」該名經理補充，而兩隊球迷將獲分發16,613張門票，兩隊球迷相加，只佔球場人數一半。

我地有得用馬體會個更衣室
